I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
I'm doing great! I'm just hanging out, relaxing before work.
What do you do for work?
I'm a salesman, but I'm not sure how much longer I want to do it.
Why is that?
It's just not very fulfilling. I'd rather do something more creative.
What are you interested in doing?
I've always loved working with animals, so maybe I'll get a job at a vet's office.
That would be great! You could also volunteer at a local animal shelter.
That's a great idea! I'll look into that.
I'm sure you'd be great at it. You seem like a very caring person.
Thank you. I'm glad you think so.
So, what kind of dog do you have?
I have a golden retriever named Charlie. He's the best dog ever.
Golden retrievers are so cute! I love their big, fluffy tails.
They are! Charlie's tail is always wagging.
